section.heading: Liaison role of Department of Labor
section.chapeau: The Department of Labor shall serve as a liaison among employers, labor unions, and community-based organizations. The liaison role may include—

paragraph.content: coordination of employers, labor unions, and community-based organizations with respect to technical assistance provided under section 2503(a) of this title;
conducting regular assessment meetings with representatives of employers, labor unions, and community-based organizations with respect to such technical assistance; and
seeking the input of employers and labor unions with respect to strategies and recommendations for improving such technical assistance.
